summary: Iteration 117: Anime and TV Series Pipeline Testing. All backend API tests passed (18/19, 1 skipped). Frontend UI verified: AnimePipeline and SeriesTVPipeline pages load correctly with all features including poster generation, parallel projects (Priority 4), and proper data-testid attributes.

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle for accessibility - minor accessibility issue (same as previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: refreshUser is properly destructured from AuthContext in both AnimePipeline.jsx (line 34) and SeriesTVPipeline.jsx (line 34)
Speed-up button calls refreshUser after speed-up in both pipelines
Poster generation UI (AI Automatica and AI + Prompt modes) working correctly
Parallel projects feature (Priority 4) working - create form visible even when projects are in production
seed_data_creation: Test anime and TV series created during testing were cleaned up via discard endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Anime and TV Series pipelines fully tested. Backend endpoints working: /api/series-pipeline/create (anime and tv_series types), /api/series-pipeline/{id}/advance-to-casting, /api/series-pipeline/{id}/advance-to-screenplay, /api/series-pipeline/{id}/write-screenplay, /api/series-pipeline/{id}/start-production, /api/series-pipeline/{id}/speed-up-production (deducts CinePass, reduces time by 30%), /api/series-pipeline/{id}/generate-poster (modes: ai_auto, ai_custom with custom_prompt), /api/series-pipeline/{id}/release (returns quality, revenue, release_event). Frontend: AnimePipeline.jsx and SeriesTVPipeline.jsx both have refreshUser properly destructured. Parallel projects feature working - create form visible when projects are in production.

backend: GET /api/series-pipeline/genres?series_type=anime - returns anime genres (shonen, seinen, shojo, mecha, isekai, etc.)
GET /api/series-pipeline/genres?series_type=tv_series - returns TV genres (drama, comedy, thriller, crime, etc.)
POST /api/series-pipeline/create with series_type=anime - creates anime successfully
GET /api/series-pipeline/{id}/available-actors - returns guest stars for anime (is_guest_star_mode, can_skip)
POST /api/series-pipeline/{id}/speed-up-production - reduces time by 30%, deducts CinePass
POST /api/series-pipeline/{id}/generate-poster mode=ai_custom - generates poster with custom prompt
POST /api/series-pipeline/create with series_type=tv_series - creates TV series
frontend: Create anime form visible with data-testid='create-anime-form' (Priority 4 - parallel projects)
Anime genre selection buttons work (shonen, seinen, etc.)
Completed anime section shows anime with quality score
Poster toggle button expands poster generation options
AI Automatica and AI + Prompt poster modes visible
Create series form visible with data-testid='create-series-form' (Priority 4 - parallel projects)
TV genre selection buttons work (Drammatico, Commedia, etc.)
refreshUser properly destructured in both AnimePipeline.jsx and SeriesTVPipeline.jsx

features_verified.priority_1_fix_creation_release_errors: VERIFIED - Anime and TV series creation works without errors
features_verified.priority_2_easy_poster_generation: VERIFIED - Poster generation available pre-release (generatePosterQuick) and post-release (expandable section with AI auto/custom modes)
features_verified.priority_3_speedup_with_cinepass: VERIFIED - Speed-up button visible during production, calls POST /api/series-pipeline/{id}/speed-up-production, deducts CinePass
features_verified.priority_4_parallel_projects: VERIFIED - Create form visible even when projects are in production, in-production cards shown above create form
